| Business Insider clipping economy | Creator economy | Visibility | Paid clipping distribution | Reported journalism |

| PhotobookShop | Influencer marketing | Credibility | Hidden gifting + edited review | Regulator action |
| FTC fake reviews rule | Reviews | Social proof | Fake/paid/insider/suppressed reviews | Regulator rule |

| Apple App Store fraud | App stores | Discovery trust | Fake ratings/reviews/charts | Platform report |
